name: Scala 3 Development
initializeCommand: mkdir -p .metals .bsp target project/target && chmod -R a+rwX .metals .bsp target project/target 2>/dev/null || true
postCreateCommand: cd /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer && mkdir -p .metals .bsp target project/target && (chmod -R a+rwX .metals .bsp target project/target 2>/dev/null || true) && node --version && npm --version && codex --version && scala-cli --version && scala3-compiler -version && sbt update && sbt sbtVersion
